allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./credentials.json'\); console.log\('top-level keys:', Object.keys\(j\)\); const inner=j.installed||j.web||j; console.log\('inner keys:', Object.keys\(inner\)\); console.log\('has client_id:', !!inner.client_id\); console.log\('has client_secret:', !!inner.client_secret\); console.log\('has redirect_uris:', !!inner.redirect_uris, Array.isArray\(inner.redirect_uris\)?inner.redirect_uris.length+' entries':''\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./credentials.json'\); console.log\('top-level keys:', Object.keys\(j\)\); const inner=j.installed||j.web||j; console.log\('wrapper:', j.installed?'installed':j.web?'web':'\(none\)'\); console.log\('inner keys:', Object.keys\(inner\).sort\(\)\); console.log\('client_id present:', !!inner.client_id\); console.log\('client_secret present:', !!inner.client_secret\); console.log\('redirect_uris:', inner.redirect_uris\);")
